chapters.title: Nomenclature used in the Panchang: (a) PAKSHA:S- Sukla; K- Krishna;
chapters.content_preview: 4. Nomenclature used in the Panchang: (a) PAKSHA:S- Sukla; K- Krishna; Example: Tithi mentioned as K2 will mean Krishna Paksha or waning moon or a Tithi mentioned as 54 will mean Sukla paksha or waxing Moon. (b) TITHI: 1. Vishkumbha, 2. Priti, 5. Ayushman etc. (€) KARANA: 1. Bava
